title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that competing with AI on knowledge is futile for humans and discusses what truly defines intelligence in the AI era. He uses Ramanujan's legacy to advocate for curiosity and human judgment as distinguishing factors, and highlights the potential of undiscovered talent the system overlooks.
